# Role Responsibility Template

Use this template when adding or updating a role entry in `docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md`. Fill in each section, removing placeholder text before submitting.

---

## [Role Name]

### Role Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the role's purpose and scope within the project. -->
_Describe the role here._

### Purpose
<!-- Why this role exists and the value it provides to the team. -->
_Explain the purpose of this role._

### Responsibilities
<!-- Use a bullet list. Each item should be a concrete, actionable responsibility. -->
- Responsibility 1
- Responsibility 2
- Responsibility 3

### Goals
<!-- What outcomes this role is accountable for delivering. -->
- Goal 1
- Goal 2

### Interactions
<!-- How this role works with other roles. Use the table below. Add or remove rows as needed. -->

| Role | Nature of Interaction |
|---|---|
| Project Manager | _Describe interaction_ |
| Team Lead | _Describe interaction_ |
| Developer | _Describe interaction_ |
| Product Owner/Manager | _Describe interaction_ |
| Scrum Master | _Describe interaction_ |
| Operations | _Describe interaction_ |

### RACI Mapping

<!-- Mark each project activity with one of: Responsible (R), Accountable (A), Consulted (C), or Informed (I). -->

| Activity | [Role Name] |
|---|---|
| Initiation | |
| Planning | |
| Risk Management | |
| Execution | |
| Release | |
| Retrospective | |

### When to Engage This Persona
<!-- Provide 3–5 specific triggers or situations when this role should be involved. -->
- Trigger 1 (e.g., at project kickoff to …)
- Trigger 2
- Trigger 3

### Sample Tasks
<!-- Optional: concrete examples of day-to-day tasks this role performs. -->
- Sample task 1
- Sample task 2
- Sample task 3

### Onboarding Notes
<!-- Information a new person stepping into this role should know. Include key contacts, tools, artifacts, and first-week priorities. -->
- Key tools: _list tools (e.g., Jira, GitHub Projects, Confluence)_
- Key artifacts to review: _list documents or boards_
- First-week priorities: _list suggested onboarding actions_
- Primary contacts: _list names or roles_
